content: Uranus has a total of 27 known moons. The five largest moons are Titania, Oberon, Umbriel, Ariel, and Miranda, while the other 22 are smaller and have been discovered more recently. The moons of Uranus are named after characters from the works of William Shakespeare and Alexander Pope.
raw_content: Uranus has a total of 27 known moons. The five largest moons are Titania, Oberon, Umbriel, Ariel, and Miranda, while the other 22 are smaller and have been discovered more recently. The moons of Uranus are named after characters from the works of William Shakespeare and Alexander Pope.
